football_players_conf015.description: Production football-specific weights at lower confidence; tests whether recall improves enough to justify more false positives.

football_players_conf040.description: Production football-specific weights at higher confidence; tests whether cleaner detections improve precision and ball false positives.

yolov8n.description: YOLOv8 nano COCO person detector; very fast generic baseline.

yolov8s.description: YOLOv8 small COCO person detector; older-generation balanced generic baseline.

yolov8m.description: YOLOv8 medium COCO person detector; tests whether generic model scale helps player coverage.

yolov10n.description: YOLOv10 nano COCO person detector; fast modern generic baseline.

yolov10s.description: YOLOv10 small COCO person detector; balanced modern generic baseline.

yolov10m.description: YOLOv10 medium COCO person detector; medium generic accuracy/speed tradeoff.

yolo11l.description: YOLO11 large COCO person detector; slow high-capacity generic baseline.

yolo11x.description: YOLO11 extra-large COCO person detector; intentionally slow upper-capacity generic baseline.

rtdetr_l.description: RT-DETR large COCO person detector; transformer-style detector baseline with different architecture.
